title: zannichellia palustris var. indica
intro: Zannichellia palustris var. indica, also known as the Indian hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Zannichelliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Indian hornwort include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Indian hornwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
